spec.objective: Author an offline integration test that exercises the full heterogeneous credential path: a Project whose task level resolves vendor='openai' and LevelProviderSecretRef='openai-secrets' must produce a Job spec with OPENAI_API_KEY injected from that secret and without a credproxy sidecar; a Project whose task level resolves vendor='anthropic' must produce the existing credproxy-plus-signed-token shape unchanged. The test uses the existing jobspec test harness (no live API call, no OPENAI_API_KEY env guard required). A second table-driven test confirms make verify-dispatch-imports stays clean — no openai import leaks from controller or cmd/manager packages.
